<details>
<summary><strong>­čôő Issue Summary</strong></summary>

**Primary Issue ([#27799](https://github.com/dotnet/maui/issues/27799)): OnAppearing and OnNavigatedTo does not work when using extended Tabbar (tabbar with more than 5 tabs) on iOS**

When loading a page from the extended tabbar (More tab with >5 tabs):
- `OnAppearing` and `OnNavigatedTo` fire correctly on first navigation
- On 2nd page load, only `OnAppearing` fires, `OnNavigatedTo` does not
- Back button: neither event fires
- `Shell.Current.GoToAsync("..")`: only `OnAppearing` fires, not `OnNavigatedTo`
- Events become random/unreliable after these operations

**Related Issue ([#27800](https://github.com/dotnet/maui/issues/27800)): Shell.BackButtonBehavior does not work when using extended Tabbar (tabbar with more than 5 tabs) on iOS**

`<Shell.BackButtonBehavior>` with Command binding does not execute when page is accessed through More tab. Works fine on Android and works fine when page is on normal tabbar (not through More).

**Related Issue ([#30862](https://github.com/dotnet/maui/issues/30862)): Shell TabBar More button causes ViewModel command binding disconnection on back navigation**

ViewModels associated with pages accessed through "More" button experience command binding disconnection when navigating back, causing RelayCommand properties to become non-functional.

**Related Issue ([#31166](https://github.com/dotnet/maui/issues/31166)): Content page onappearing not firing if tabs are on the more tab on iOS**

On iOS, if you select a tab through the more button on a tabbed page, the selected content page `OnAppearing` event does not trigger. Tabs not on the more button work fine.

**Steps to Reproduce:**
1. Create Shell app with >5 tabs in TabBar (More button appears)
2. Navigate to page through More tab
3. Navigate to sub-page
4. Use back button or `GoToAsync("..")`
5. Observe: lifecycle events don't fire, back button behavior doesn't work

**Platforms Affected:**
- [x] iOS (all issues)
- [ ] Android (works fine)
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] MacCatalyst

**Regression**: Not sure, did not test other versions

**Common Theme**: All issues relate to iOS Shell More tab navigation (>5 tabs) where navigation completion tasks and lifecycle events are not properly handled.

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>­čöž Fix Candidates</strong></summary>

**Status**: Ôťů COMPLETE

| # | Source | Approach | Test Result | Files Changed | Model | Notes |
|---|--------|----------|-------------|---------------|-------|-------|
| 1 | try-fix | Set NavDelegate on MoreNavigationController | ÔŁî FAIL | `ShellSectionRenderer.cs` (+7) | Claude Sonnet 3.5 | **Why failed:** Delegate's DidShowViewController tries to complete tasks from _completionTasks dictionary, but tasks are never added for More nav - they're only added when pushing via base controller. Need to ALSO populate _completionTasks for More pushes, not just set delegate. |
| 2 | try-fix | Manually complete tasks after More push/pop | Ôťů PASS | `ShellSectionRenderer.cs` (+13) | Claude Sonnet 4 | Works! Directly completes tasks after MoreNavigationController push/pop instead of waiting for delegate. Simple approach: check _completionTasks after push, complete _popCompletionTask after pop. |
| PR | PR #27932 | Handle More navigation completion tasks + back button + SendPop fix | Ôťů PASS (Gate) | `ShellSectionRenderer.cs` (+24 -3) | Original PR - adds `HandleMoreNavigationCompletionTasks` helper method, sets BackAction for back button support, modifies `SendPop` signature, handles both push and pop |

**Note:** try-fix candidates (1, 2, 3...) are added during Phase 4. PR's fix is reference only.

**Exhausted:** No (stopped at user request after 2 attempts)

**Comparison Analysis:**

Both fixes solve the **core problem** (completion tasks not firing for More navigation) but with key differences:

| Aspect | try-fix #2 | PR's Fix | Winner |
|--------|------------|----------|--------|
| **Core fix** | Inline task completion in push/pop | Helper method `HandleMoreNavigationCompletionTasks` | Tie - both work |
| **Lines changed** | +13 lines | +24 -3 lines | try-fix (simpler) |
| **Code organization** | Inline logic | Extracted helper method | PR (better abstraction) |
| **Back button support** | ÔŁî Missing | Ôťů Sets BackAction | **PR** (more complete) |
| **SendPop fix** | ÔŁî Missing | Ôťů Removes unused parameter | PR (cleaner API) |
| **Scope** | Navigation completion only | Navigation completion + back button + API cleanup | **PR** (more comprehensive) |

**Key Missing Features in try-fix #2:**
1. **BackAction setup** (line 613 in PR) - Enables back button behavior for More navigation
2. **SendPop signature fix** - PR removes unused `topViewController` parameter, cleaner API
3. Both issues #27800 (BackButtonBehavior) and #31166 would NOT be fixed by try-fix #2

**Selected Fix:** **PR's fix** - More comprehensive solution that addresses ALL linked issues (#27799, #27800, #30862, #31166), not just the navigation lifecycle issue. The additional 11 lines provide critical back button support and API cleanup.
